As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services on 25 July 2024 traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Mainland have been cancelled or the destination changed due to expected adverse weather conditions. 

Cancelled train services:

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
To Shenzhenbei Station:G5612
To Xiamen Station:G3004, G3006, G3008
To Fuzhou Station:G3002

To Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
From Shenzhenbei Station:G5609
From Xiamen Station:G3003, G3005, G3007
From Fuzhou Station:G3001

Destination Changed:
G6391 (will depart from Chaoshan Station)
G6392 (will arrive at Chaoshan Station)

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from HSR website or mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. 

Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.

內地鐵路單位通報，由於預期天氣情況惡劣，2024年7月25日部分來往香港西九龍站及內地的高速鐵路列車車次取消或更改目的地。

前往廈門站:G3004,G3006,G3008
前往福州站:G3002

由福州站:G3001

如需退票，您可在30天內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: No train service between Prince Edward and Ho Man Tin on the Kwun Tong Line on 28 July
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 7月28日觀塘綫太子至何文田列車服務暫停

2024-07-24T17:30:00.CONTENT_EN: There will be no train service between Prince Edward and Ho Man Tin on the Kwun Tong Line on Sunday 28 July to facilitate large-scale tunnel asset renewal work. Please plan your journeys using alternative routes. More passengers than usual are expected in Prince Edward on that day. This may result in a longer waiting time on platforms or for station facilities; Exit C of Yau Ma Tei will also be temporarily closed, please use other exits. For details, please refer to the website of MTR Corporation Limited (https://www. mtr. com. hk/en/customer/main/ktl-service-suspension. html).
2024-07-24T17:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 配合隧道大型資產更新工程，於7月28日(星期日)，觀塘綫來往太子至何文田的列車服務暫停，請預早規劃行程及使用替代路綫。 預計當天太子站乘客較多，候車及等候使用站內設施時間或會較長；油麻地站C出入口亦會暫時關閉，請使用其他出入口。 詳細請參閱港鐵公司網頁：https://www.mtr.com.hk/ch/customer/main/ktl-service-suspension.html

2024-07-25T18:01:00.CONTENT_EN:
There will be no train service between Prince Edward and Ho Man Tin on the Kwun Tong Line on Sunday 28 July to facilitate large-scale tunnel asset renewal work. Please plan your journeys using alternative routes. 

Passengers going to Mong Kok or Yau Ma Tei should take the Tsuen Wan Line; to Ho Man Tin should take the Tuen Ma Line. 

More passengers than usual are expected in Prince Edward on that day. This may result in a longer waiting time on platforms or for station facilities; Exit C of Yau Ma Tei will also be temporarily closed, please use other exits. 

For details, please refer to the website of MTR Corporation Limited (https://www. mtr. com. hk/en/customer/main/ktl-service-suspension. html).
2024-07-25T18:01:00.CONTENT_CN:
配合隧道大型資產更新工程，於7月28日(星期日)，觀塘綫來往太子至何文田的列車服務暫停，請預早規劃行程及使用替代路綫。

往旺角或油麻地，請使用荃灣綫；往何文田，請使用屯馬綫。

預計當天太子站乘客較多，候車及等候使用站內設施時間或會較長；油麻地站C出入口亦會暫時關閉，請使用其他出入口。

詳細請參閱港鐵公司網頁：
https://www.mtr.com.hk/ch/customer/main/ktl-service-suspension.html。
